statement: Stored vs calculated fields — Task dates are source of truth. Action/phase spans may be cached for — Backend DTOs, API mappers, date helpers, timeline views.
affected_modules: src/types/; src/services/api-mappers.ts; src/utils/date.helpers.ts; src/utils/node.helpers.ts; DTO/domain/builder mapping
ux_impact: UI remains fast without confusing the user.
